name: eisenhower-prioritization
description: Eisenhower Matrix-based task prioritization for any workload
author: Bonfires

skills.name: eisenhower-prioritization
skills.description: Prioritize any workload using the Eisenhower Matrix. Use this when you have a list of tasks, incidents, findings, or workload context and need to decide what to focus on. Categorizes work into Urgent+Important (Q1: do now), Important+NotUrgent (Q2: schedule), Urgent+NotImportant (Q3: delegate), and Neither (Q4: delete). Accepts freeform input: Jira summaries, meeting notes, sprint dumps, bullet lists, or prose descriptions.

commands.name: prioritize
commands.description: Explicitly trigger prioritization with optional path/context
